abstract: Responsive web design patterns and breakpoint strategies. Covers mobile-first Tailwind CSS layouts, fluid typography with clamp(), CSS container queries, responsive images (srcset + picture + lazy loading), touch target accessibility (44px minimum), and viewport-aware component patterns. Includes 4-breakpoint strategy (375/768/1024/1440), responsive navigation, fluid hero sections, adaptive grids, responsive tables, and container query components. Seven production-ready patterns with Tailwind CSS examples.
patterns: Responsive Grid (1 col mobile → 2 tablet → 3 desktop)
Fluid Hero Section (full-viewport mobile, contained desktop)
Responsive Spacing Scale (adaptive padding and gaps)
Responsive Table (horizontal scroll mobile, full table desktop)
key_concepts: Responsive images with srcset and picture element
Safe area handling for notched devices
Layout shift prevention with aspect ratios

accessibility.responsive_text: Use clamp() for smooth scaling between breakpoints
accessibility.images: Always include alt text, width/height attributes, and loading='lazy'
accessibility.safe_areas: Use env(safe-area-inset-*) for notched phone support
